_about: Default parameters for the Liu-Tsyvinski-Wu (2022) 3-factor crypto model. These are starting points — power users override per-factor via the Factor constructors.
_source: Liu, Tsyvinski & Wu (2022). 'Common Risk Factors in Cryptocurrency'. Journal of Finance.

market.notes: Falls back to equal-weight if panel.volumes is None.

size.notes: Long bottom 30% by trailing 30-period avg volume, short top 30%.

momentum.notes: Long top 20% by 30-period past return (excluding most recent 7 periods), short bottom 20%.

regression.notes: Auto NW lag = floor(4 * (n/100)^(2/9)) per Newey-West (1994). Set use_robust=True for Huber+NW on fat-tailed strategies.
